title: Results, not decks.
seoDescription: Real results with real numbers. 2300% ROAS, cost per conversion from $2,000 to under $1, an 81.5% political win rate. Browse by industry.

sections.draftLabel: Case Studies hub, V2 draft (V1 preserved at case-studies.md)
sections.metaTitle: Programmatic Advertising Case Studies | Genius Monkey
sections.notes: SEO note: the H1 becomes the approved signature line; the primary keyword moves to the first body sentence and the numbers-section intro (same trade as platform V2). Card titles are the study cards; each links to its case study URL (all in brand/facts.md).

content.text: Anyone can put "proven results" on a homepage. These are our programmatic advertising case studies instead, twenty-seven of them, published with the numbers intact and readable end to end. Find a brand like yours and see what happened when they stopped guessing.

Genius Monkey's case studies are grouped by industry and show verified results with real numbers, including a 2300% return on ad spend for Country Thunder, cost per conversion down from $2,000 to under $1 for onsemi, and an 81.5% average win rate across political campaigns. The longer version is below, one industry at a time.

items: $230 back for every $1 spent, a 2300% return on ad spend. Country Thunder.
Cost per conversion from $2,000 to under $1. onsemi.
887% more new website visitors and 900% more store visitors. Canales Furniture.
Cost per acquisition from $83 to under $28 in three months. BrickHouse Nutrition.
Cost per conversion down 89% in nine months. Freed-Hardeman University.
Patient visits up 150% on a 300% return on ad spend. A national telemedicine company.
An 81.5% average win rate for political clients, reaching 2X the audience of other digital channels and 6X traditional TV and radio.

content.text: Every card opens the full story, numbers and all. Where an industry page exists, the group header takes you there too.

content.text: A 2300% return is easy to type and hard to earn. So look at how it's counted. Pixel Monkey follows the path from first impression to final conversion, and the reporting that produced every number on this page ships with every account. Audit ours before you spend yours.

sections.heading: Your industry is probably in here

content.text: Your results aren't, yet. Request a demo and let's talk about what your version of these numbers looks like.

items: V2 changes vs V1: H1 is now the approved signature "Results, not decks." with the keyword moved into the first body sentence. Hero opens with a jab at the genre ("Anyone can put 'proven results' on a homepage"). The AEO block and marquee bullets merged into one section to kill the double-read of the same three stats. "Check our math before you trust yours" replaced with the cleaner "Audit ours before you spend yours."
Guesses flagged for the capture loop: signature line as H1, the "proven results" genre jab, "Audit ours before you spend yours."

Grouping, anonymization, and facts identical to V1; every card traces to brand/facts.md or case-study-proof.md. Count claim: twenty-seven studies across 25 cards (two cards cover a written plus video pair).
AEO: summary block still opens the numbers section as a 40 to 60 word extractable answer with stats attached.
